careful_truster.rationale: Lower conversion rate (65%) — needs more touches and tighter spacing to build trust before interest decays. 7/week allows full 5-touch sequence in first week.

status_seeker.rationale: Highest conversion rate (94.5%) — converts quickly, avoid over-saturation. Wider spacing preserves exclusivity perception aligned with status archetype.

easy_decider.rationale: Action-oriented archetype with 91% conversion. Higher daily cap (3) to capitalize on impulse windows. Shorter spacing — these buyers decide fast but need the right moment.
